properties.description: Located at Oats Street in Kewdale, Belmont, Tomato Lake contains a wetland, a central lake, 1.6km walking trail, nature sanctuary island and boardwalk across the lake. There are toilets, BBQs, picnic tables and playground with a space net rope climb.
properties.name: Tomato Lake Reserve
